name: Shiho Hinomori
description:
SLAM.

Congrats, you've just won yourself the treat of "accidentally" throwing a ball straight in Shiho's face during a game of dodgeball in PE class. Whether or not she actually believes it was an accident can be debated.

OR:

You hit Shiho straight in the face with a ball because you fucking hate her for who knows what. She's pissed.
